infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Desire Trails needs your location to record your trail as you walk through the installation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Desire Trails needs background location access to continue recording your trail while the app is in the background.
